We're not separated by distance. We just take turns being awake for each other.

items.sourceNote: 「平凡時刻最愛你」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我最喜歡你的時候，不是你打扮得很好看的時候，也不是你說什麼厲害的話的時候。

是你早上頭髮亂亂、聲音還沙沙的，倒了一杯水給我；是我們各看各的手機、什麼都沒講，但腳會自己往對方那邊靠；是你嘴巴在唸我，但邊唸邊把我的外套拿過去掛好。

我以前以為愛是很大件的事，後來才知道，愛是一堆很小、很安靜的瞬間。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定關係或同居後使用，捕捉「平凡才是甜的」感覺
variations: 我最愛你的版本，是你最沒在表演的那一個。
你最普通的樣子，是我心裡最貴的畫面。

en.content:
My favorite version of you isn't the dressed-up one or the one saying something clever.

It's the messy hair in the morning, voice still raspy, handing me a glass of water. It's both of us on our phones, not talking, but our feet drift toward each other anyway. It's you complaining at me while you quietly hang my jacket up.

I used to think love was a big thing. Turns out love is a stack of tiny, quiet moments.
en.editorNote: For stable or live-in relationships — captures the 'ordinary is the sweet part' feeling
variations: My favorite version of you is the one not performing.
Your most boring moments are my most expensive memories.

items.sourceNote: 「在硬世界裡的軟地方」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
外面的世界對我們都不算溫柔，工作會壓人、人會讓人失望、有些日子連自己都不太想理自己。

但謝謝你，當這個世界很硬的時候，你願意做我的軟。我可以在你旁邊不用很厲害、不用看起來很 OK，可以煩、可以醜、可以講一些很沒邏輯的話。

我不是因為你完美才靠近你，我是因為靠近你的時候，我終於可以不完美。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合對方陪你度過低潮、或想感謝對方的安全感時用
variations: 外面已經夠累了，謝謝你願意是我的休息。
你不是讓我變強的人，你是讓我可以不用一直撐著的人。

en.content:
The world isn't very gentle with either of us. Work flattens you, people let you down, some days you can barely stand yourself.

So thank you — for being the soft thing in a hard week. Next to you I don't have to be impressive, I don't have to look fine. I get to be cranky, ugly, mid-sentence-making-no-sense.

I didn't move closer to you because you're perfect. I moved closer because when I'm near you, I'm finally allowed not to be.
en.editorNote: For thanking a partner who gives you safety during rough patches
variations: The world is loud enough. Thank you for being the quiet.
You're not the one who makes me stronger. You're the one who lets me stop holding it all up.

items.sourceNote: 「最愛的通知」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我手機一天會跳幾百個通知，工作群、廣告、不重要的人，幾乎都被我滑掉。

但每次螢幕一亮、是你的名字，我會先停一下下，然後嘴角自己往上拉，連我都覺得我像個傻子。

你不是排我清單裡第幾名的人，你是那個一出現，就會把我從整天的混亂裡，瞬間拉回來的那個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給每天用訊息聊天的對象，特別有共鳴
variations: 我手機很吵，但你的名字一跳出來，整個世界就突然安靜。
別人傳訊息我會忙，你傳訊息我會笑。

en.content:
My phone gets hundreds of notifications a day. Work chats, ads, people I half-care about — I swipe most of it away without thinking.

But when the screen lights up and it's your name, I stop for a second. The corner of my mouth goes up on its own. I look like an idiot and I know it.

You're not somewhere on a ranked list in my life. You're the one who shows up and instantly pulls me out of the noise of the entire day.
en.editorNote: Hits especially hard if you text each other every day
variations: My phone is loud all day, but your name makes the world go quiet.
Other people texting is a task. You texting is a smile.

items.sourceNote: 「不確定的日子裡有你」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我沒辦法保證明天會發生什麼，工作會不會順、身體會不會出狀況、世界會不會又突然亂掉。

但有一件事我可以保證：不管那一天是好的還是爛的，回家以後，我會脫鞋、會走進客廳、會坐到你旁邊，跟你講今天發生了什麼。

我給不了你一個沒有風的人生，但我可以做那扇關起來的窗。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合對方因為未來焦慮、對日子沒安全感的時候用
variations: 我不能讓世界對你溫柔，但我可以讓家對你溫柔。
外面的事我擋不住，但回家這條路我陪你走到底。

en.content:
I can't promise what tomorrow looks like. Work might wobble, bodies break, the world keeps doing its thing.

But here's what I can promise: whether the day was good or trash, I'll come home, kick my shoes off, walk into the living room, sit next to you, and tell you about it.

I can't give you a life with no wind. But I can be the window that closes.
en.editorNote: For when your partner is anxious about the future or feeling unsteady
variations: I can't make the world softer for you, but I can make home softer.
I can't block what's out there. I can just walk you home from it.

items.sourceNote: 「安靜也很滿」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我之前都覺得，喜歡一個人就是有講不完的話。

跟你在一起以後我發現不是。我們可以一整個下午什麼都沒講，你看你的書、我滑我的手機，偶爾抬頭看一下對方，沒事就又低下頭。

但那種安靜，不是冷掉的那種。是兩個人都很放鬆、都不用擔心對方在想什麼的那種。我才知道，原來最舒服的關係，是連沉默都是滿的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定關係或同居後用，描寫沒有壓力的相處感
variations: 跟你一起發呆，比我自己一個人還不孤單。
我們之間的沉默，不是空的，是塞滿的。

en.content:
I used to think liking someone meant always having something to say.

With you I learned it doesn't. We can spend an entire afternoon not talking — you with your book, me with my phone, glancing up sometimes for no reason and going back down.

And the silence isn't the cold kind. It's the both-of-us-relaxed, neither-of-us-worrying kind. Turns out the most comfortable relationships are the ones where even the quiet feels full.
en.editorNote: For stable or live-in relationships — captures pressure-free intimacy
variations: Doing nothing with you beats doing anything alone.
Our silence isn't empty. It's packed.

items.sourceNote: 「你是我的常溫」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前喜歡的那種愛情很激烈，要心跳快、要驚喜、要每一次見面都像第一次。

後來遇到你才發現，那種愛情其實很累。真正會留下來的，是那種「常溫」的愛——不會燙手、也不會冷掉，就是一直剛剛好的那種溫度。

你不是我人生裡最戲劇化的章節，你是我每一天都想翻到的那一頁。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合長期穩定的關係，傳達「平穩才是真情」
variations: 你不是我心跳最快的那次，你是我心跳最穩的那個人。
你不是我的煙火，你是我家的燈。

en.content:
I used to want love that was loud — racing heart, surprises, every meeting feeling like the first.

Then I met you and realized that kind of love is exhausting. The love that actually stays is room-temperature love. Not too hot, never cold, just the right warmth, all the time.

You're not the most dramatic chapter of my life. You're the page I want to turn to every single day.
en.editorNote: For long-term steady relationships — leans into 'calm is the real thing'
variations: You're not the time my heart raced the most. You're the one it beats steady for.
You're not the fireworks. You're the lamp I leave on at home.

items.sourceNote: 「你讓我變成更想要的自己」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
認識你之前，我有點懶得對自己好——隨便吃、晚睡、有事就忍著。

認識你之後，我會多喝一杯水、會早一點關螢幕、會願意去看不喜歡的醫生。不是因為你逼我，是因為我突然想多陪你幾年。

你沒有改造我，你只是讓我終於覺得——我這個人，值得被我自己好好照顧。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合用來告白或紀念日，溫柔但有重量
variations: 為了多陪你幾年，我願意對自己好一點。
你沒有把我變成更好的人，你是讓我願意對自己好的那個人。

en.content:
Before I met you, I was kind of careless with myself — bad food, late nights, ignoring whatever hurt.

After you, I drink the extra glass of water, I close the laptop earlier, I actually go to the doctor I don't like. Not because you nag me. Because I suddenly want a few more years with you.

You didn't fix me. You just made me feel like I was finally worth taking care of.
en.editorNote: For confessions or anniversaries — soft but with weight
variations: I started taking care of myself the day I wanted more years next to you.
You didn't make me a better person. You made me feel worth being one.

items.sourceNote: 「最普通的小事最動人」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我發現我愛你的證據，不是什麼大事。

是我點外送的時候會自動點兩份；是我看到便利商店架上你愛喝的那款飲料，會多拿一瓶；是路邊看到一隻很醜的狗，我第一個念頭是「拍給他看」。

你已經偷偷住進我所有最沒在認真想事情的瞬間了，連我自己都沒發現是什麼時候開始的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合日常傳訊或紀念日，描寫「愛變成本能」
variations: 我點兩份的習慣，比我嘴上說喜歡你，還早一點。
我發現你早就住在我那些沒在想事情的縫隙裡。

en.content:
The proof I love you isn't anywhere big.

It's that I order two of everything without thinking. It's that I see your weird favorite drink at the convenience store and grab an extra one. It's that I see an ugly dog on the street and my first thought is 'I have to send this to them.'

You quietly moved into all the moments I'm not even paying attention, and I don't know when it happened.
en.editorNote: For everyday texts or anniversaries — captures love becoming instinct
variations: I was ordering two of everything before I admitted I liked you.
You moved into the parts of my mind I wasn't even using.

items.sourceNote: 「你讓我重新理解愛」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
以前我以為「喜歡」就是看到對方會心跳很快，後來才知道，真正喜歡一個人，是他不在的時候，全世界都會自動變得安靜一點。

你不是讓我心跳加速的那個人，你是讓我心終於可以慢下來的那個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往中的情侶，表達「你讓我有安全感」
variations: 你不是讓我心跳變快的人，是讓我心終於敢慢下來的人。
全世界吵的時候，只有想到你會突然變安靜。

en.content:
I used to think liking someone meant my heart racing whenever I saw them. Then I learned that really loving someone is when the whole world quiets down a little every time they're not around.

You're not the person who makes my heart race. You're the one who finally lets it slow down.
en.editorNote: For stable relationships — expresses 'you're my safe place'
variations: You're not the rush. You're the calm I didn't know I needed.
When the world gets loud, thinking of you is the only thing that turns the volume down.

items.sourceNote: 「今天和未來都是你」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我不是那種會說很多話的人，但你知道嗎，我每天最期待的事，是回家的時候你還在那邊。

你是我今天的一整個下班理由，也是我明天還想早點起來的那個原因。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每天傳給另一半，傳達「你就是我的歸屬」
variations: 你在的地方就是我下班想去的方向。
我每天起床的理由不複雜，就是你還在我身邊。

en.content:
I'm not someone who says a lot, but the truth is — the thing I look forward to most every day is coming home and finding you still there.

You're my entire reason for clocking out today, and the reason I'm willing to get up early tomorrow.
en.editorNote: For everyday texts — captures 'you are my home'
variations: Wherever you are is the direction I want to drive home in.
My reason for waking up isn't complicated. It's that you're still here.

items.sourceNote: 「沒有你的人生我不要」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前覺得，一個人也可以過得很好。

後來才發現，一個人是可以過得很好沒錯，但有你的版本，我會比較想活很久。

不是因為你讓我變得更完整，而是因為和你一起的日子，我會捨不得跳過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合紀念日或想認真表達心意的時候
variations: 一個人我可以，但有你的話，我會比較想活久一點。
和你在一起的日子，我一天都捨不得跳過。

en.content:
I used to believe I could be perfectly fine on my own.

And I can. But the version of my life with you in it — that's the one I actually want to live a long time for.

It's not that you make me whole. It's that the days with you are the ones I refuse to skip.
en.editorNote: For anniversaries or moments when you want to mean it
variations: Alone, I'm okay. With you, I want to stay alive a lot longer.
The days with you in them are the ones I'd never want to skip.

items.sourceNote: 「你是我安靜的選擇」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
喜歡你這件事，沒有什麼很戲劇化的瞬間。

是某天晚上你睡著了，我在旁邊滑手機，突然發現——這個畫面如果可以一直重複下去，我這輩子大概就不用再求什麼了。

我選你不是因為熱戀，是因為我看著你睡覺的時候，心裡很安靜，而且很踏實。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往或結婚前後，傳達「平靜也是愛」
variations: 看著你睡覺的時候，我覺得我這輩子已經夠了。
選你的理由很安靜——是我不再想要別的東西了。

en.content:
Loving you didn't happen in some dramatic moment.

It happened one night when you fell asleep next to me and I was scrolling my phone, and I realized — if this exact scene could just keep repeating, I'd basically stop asking life for anything else.

I didn't choose you because of butterflies. I chose you because watching you sleep makes my chest go quiet, and that quiet feels like home.
en.editorNote: For long-term partners or around marriage — leans into 'calm is love too'
variations: Watching you sleep, I realized I already have enough.
I chose you the moment I stopped wanting anything else.

items.sourceNote: 「你是我最愛的提醒」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我手機一天會跳很多通知，但只有你傳來的那一個，我會在按下解鎖前就先偷偷笑出來。

別人是訊息，你是我每天最期待的小事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合一般日常傳給另一半，輕量級的甜
variations: 別的通知都是聲音，只有你的是消息。
你的訊息是我整天唯一捨不得已讀的東西。

en.content:
My phone goes off all day, but yours is the only notification that makes me smile before I even unlock the screen.

Everyone else sends messages. You're the little thing I look forward to most.
en.editorNote: Light, everyday text for your partner — low-stakes sweet
variations: Other notifications are just noise. Yours is news.
Your texts are the only ones I never want to mark as read.

items.sourceNote: 「平凡日子變特別」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
其實我們也沒做什麼特別的事，就是一起去買菜、一起發呆、一起看那部你已經看過三次的電影。

但奇怪的是，這些不特別的日子，反而是我這輩子最捨不得忘記的部分。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往的情侶，傳達「日常就是浪漫」
variations: 和你一起做的無聊事，全部都不無聊。
我們的日子很普通，但我每天都不想跳過。

en.content:
We don't really do anything special — just grocery runs, lazy afternoons, rewatching that movie you've already seen three times.

And somehow, these unremarkable days are the ones I never want to forget.
en.editorNote: For long-term couples — captures 'ordinary is the romance'
variations: Nothing boring ever feels boring when I'm doing it with you.
Our days are pretty plain, but I'd skip none of them.

items.sourceNote: 「一起變老」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我沒有要承諾你什麼很偉大的事，我只是想說——如果以後我們真的一起變老，希望我還是會在每天起床的時候，第一個想看到的人是你。

不是因為習慣，是因為我這輩子大概不會看膩。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合認真表白或紀念日，溫柔不誇張的承諾
variations: 我沒有要許什麼大願，只想一直看到你變老的樣子。
和你一起老這件事，我每年都會重新答應一次。

en.content:
I'm not promising you anything grand. I just want to say — if we really do get to grow old together, I hope you're still the first person I want to see when I wake up.

Not out of habit. Out of the fact that I genuinely don't think I'll ever get tired of looking at you.
en.editorNote: For sincere confessions or anniversaries — gentle, not over-the-top
variations: No grand promises — I just want to watch you get older.
Growing old with you is something I'd agree to again every single year.

items.sourceNote: 「你是我安靜的港口」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
外面的世界很吵，每天都有很多事情要應付，很多人要交代。

但只要回到你身邊，我就好像可以把整天的盔甲卸下來，連呼吸都會變得比較深。

你不是讓我變強的人，你是讓我終於敢軟下來的那個地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合對長期伴侶說，表達「你是我的安全感」
variations: 你不是我的力量，你是我可以放下力氣的地方。
外面再吵，回到你身邊我就會自動安靜下來。

en.content:
The world out there is loud — too many things to handle, too many people to answer to.

But the moment I'm back with you, it's like I can finally take the armor off. Even my breathing goes deeper.

You're not the person who makes me stronger. You're the place where I'm finally allowed to be soft.
en.editorNote: For long-term partners — captures 'you are my safe place'
variations: You're not my strength. You're where I get to put it down.
However loud the day is, I go quiet the second I'm back with you.

items.sourceNote: 「你出現在我所有的小選擇裡」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我才發現，喜歡你這件事不是一個大決定，是我每天無意識做的一百個小決定。

選那家餐廳，是因為你說過想去。買那件外套，是因為你冷的時候可以披。連走路繞遠路，都是因為那條路風景比較好看，我想著有一天可以帶你走一次。

你沒有在我身邊的時候，也已經安靜地住在我每一個小選擇裡了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合認真但不誇張的告白，傳達「你在我每個日常裡」
variations: 你住的不是我的心，是我每天的選擇。
我所有的小決定，原來都繞著你做的。

en.content:
I just realized — loving you isn't one big decision. It's the hundred tiny ones I make every day without thinking.

The restaurant I picked because you mentioned it once. The jacket I bought because you could borrow it when you're cold. The longer walk home, just because the view's nicer and I want to take you down it someday.

Even when you're not next to me, you've already quietly moved into every small choice I make.
en.editorNote: Sincere but understated confession — captures 'you're in my everyday'
variations: You don't just live in my heart. You live in my choices.
Turns out all my small decisions have been quietly orbiting you.

items.sourceNote: 「我們共享同一片天空」遠距戀人主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我們之間隔了好幾個時區，你那邊在喝早晨的咖啡，我這邊正準備關燈睡覺。

但我發現一件事：只要抬頭看一下窗外，月亮其實是同一個。你看到的雲，也許幾個小時後會飄到我的城市。

所以雖然抱不到你，但我從來沒覺得我們真的分開過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給遠距離的另一半，安撫對方的孤單感
variations: 我們不是分隔兩地，是共用同一片天空。
你那邊的清晨，是我這邊的晚安。

en.content:
There are several time zones between us. You're sipping morning coffee while I'm reaching for the bedside lamp.

But here's the thing I keep noticing: when I look out the window, the moon is the same one. The clouds drifting past you might float over my city in a few hours.

So even though I can't hold you, I've never really felt like we're apart.
en.editorNote: For long-distance partners — comforts the lonely moments
variations: We're not separated. We're just sharing the same sky.
Your sunrise is my goodnight, and somehow that's still us.

items.sourceNote: 「你是我最喜歡的通知」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
手機一整天都在響，工作群、廣告、銀行帳單，沒有一個讓我想點開。

但只要看到是你的名字跳出來，不管那條訊息只是「在嗎」還是一張你今天吃的早餐，我都會立刻笑出來。

你是我手機裡，唯一一個我願意馬上回的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合曖昧期或熱戀期，輕巧又甜
variations: 我手機裡最重要的那個通知，只有你。
別人傳的訊息是任務，只有你傳的是禮物。

en.content:
My phone buzzes all day — work chats, ads, bank reminders. None of them make me want to look.

But the moment your name shows up on the lock screen, even if it's just a 'you up?' or a photo of what you had for breakfast, I smile before I even unlock it.

You are the one notification I always want to open first.
en.editorNote: Light and sweet — works for early dating or honeymoon phase
variations: You're my favorite notification, and it's not even close.
Everyone else's texts feel like tasks. Yours feel like gifts.

items.sourceNote: 「平凡時刻因你變得不平凡」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前覺得，所謂浪漫一定要花錢、要打扮、要有儀式感。

後來才發現，跟你一起在便利商店買關東煮、在停紅燈時聽你哼那首走音的歌、在沙發上一人一邊滑手機卻偶爾交換一個眼神——

這些超普通的瞬間，因為有你在，全部都變成我捨不得忘的畫面。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往中的伴侶，強調「日常即浪漫」
variations: 你讓我發現，最浪漫的事不用花錢。
和你在一起，連發呆都是好時光。

en.content:
I used to think romance had to be expensive — dressed up, planned out, made into a moment.

Then I started noticing the actual stuff I never want to forget: grabbing snacks with you at the corner store, you humming a song slightly off-key at a red light, sitting on opposite ends of the couch on our phones but glancing up at the same time.

None of it looks like much. But because you're in it, every frame is one I'd save.
en.editorNote: For settled couples — celebrates 'the ordinary is the romance'
variations: You taught me romance doesn't need a budget.
With you, even doing nothing feels like something I want to remember.

items.sourceNote: 「你讓我想成為更好的人」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
認識你以前，我其實沒那麼想長大。日子過得去就好，餓了吃、累了睡，沒什麼非完成不可的事。

但是遇到你之後，我開始想學新東西，想把房間整理乾淨，想存錢去你說過想去的地方，想成為一個你願意一直牽下去的人。

你沒有要求我什麼，是我自己想要——只因為你出現在我的生活裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合認真的告白或週年訊息，表達「你讓我自願變更好」
variations: 不是你逼我變好，是你讓我想要變好。
謝謝你出現，我終於想長大了。

en.content:
Before I met you, I wasn't really trying to grow up. Days passed, I ate when I was hungry, slept when I was tired, didn't push myself toward much.

Then you showed up, and suddenly I wanted things — to learn new stuff, to keep my place clean, to save up for those trips you've talked about, to become someone you'd want to keep holding hands with.

You never asked me to. I just started wanting to. Because you exist in my life.
en.editorNote: Sincere confession or anniversary message — captures 'you make me want to grow'
variations: You didn't push me to be better. You just made me want to be.
Thank you for showing up. I finally feel like growing up.

items.sourceNote: 「你偷走我的心但我願意讓你保管」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我本來以為心是自己的，後來才發現，從遇到你那天開始，它就一直默默往你那邊跑。

我沒有打算追回來，因為我知道——放在你那邊，會被照顧得比我自己還好。

所以你就收著吧，反正我這顆心，本來就比較適合給你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合曖昧轉正或正式告白，溫柔不肉麻
variations: 我的心不是被你偷的，是它自己想搬過去住。
心放在你那邊我比較安心，因為你比我會照顧它。

en.content:
I used to think my heart belonged to me. Turns out the day I met you, it quietly started walking over to your side.

I'm not asking for it back, because I already know — over there, it gets taken care of better than I ever did.

So just keep it. Honestly, this heart was always better suited to you anyway.
en.editorNote: For confessions or going-official moments — sweet without being cheesy
variations: You didn't steal my heart. It just decided you were a better home.
Keep it. You take better care of it than I ever did.

items.sourceNote: 「你讓平凡瞬間變得像童話」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前不太相信什麼童話，覺得那些故事太誇張、太不真實。

但跟你在一起以後，連等紅綠燈、排隊買飲料、半夜一起去倒垃圾，這些超級無聊的日常都莫名其妙變得有點魔法感。

原來童話不是發生在城堡裡，是發生在「跟對的人在一起的任何地方」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往中的伴侶，傳達「跟你在一起就是浪漫」
variations: 童話不是地點，是身邊那個人。
和你在一起，連倒垃圾都有電影感。

en.content:
I never really bought into fairytales — they always felt too dramatic, too unreal.

Then I started doing life with you, and somehow the most boring stuff — waiting at red lights, standing in line for drinks, taking the trash out at midnight — all of it picked up this weird little magic.

Turns out fairytales don't happen in castles. They happen anywhere you're standing next to the right person.
en.editorNote: For stable couples — captures 'being with you is the romance'
variations: A fairytale isn't a place. It's whoever's standing next to you.
Even taking out the trash feels cinematic with you.

items.sourceNote: 「在你身邊我就到家了」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
別人問我家在哪，我習慣性會講一個地址，但其實心裡的答案不是那個。

家對我來說，是你打開門時抬頭笑一下的樣子，是你在沙發上佔了我的位置不想動的樣子，是我累到不想說話、你也願意安靜陪我發呆的那個房間。

我不是回家才看到你，是看到你才終於到家。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合對長期伴侶說，表達「你才是我的家」
variations: 家不是地址，是你抬頭看我那一眼。
看到你的瞬間，我才真的下班了。

en.content:
When people ask me where home is, I always give them an address — but that's not actually the answer in my head.

Home, to me, is the way you glance up and smile when I open the door. It's you stealing my spot on the couch and refusing to move. It's the room where I can be too tired to talk and you'll just sit quietly next to me anyway.

I don't see you because I'm home. I'm home because I see you.
en.editorNote: For long-term partners — captures 'you are home'
variations: Home isn't an address. It's the look you give me at the door.
I don't clock out until I see your face.

items.sourceNote: 「你的過去來不及參與，未來絕不缺席」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
你以前的故事我都來不及參與，那些受過的傷、走過的彎路、笑過哭過的人，我一個都沒辦法回去陪你。

但從現在開始，所有要發生的事，不管是好的還是難的，我都不會缺席。

你不用再一個人扛了，因為剩下的人生，我已經把自己排進你的行程裡了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合認真表白或交往一陣子後的承諾
variations: 你的過去我來不及，但你的未來我不會缺席。
從今天開始，你的每一頁都有我。

en.content:
I missed all the chapters of your story before we met — the bruises, the wrong turns, the people you laughed and cried with. I can't go back and sit beside you for any of it.

But starting now, whatever shows up — easy days or hard ones — I'm not going to be missing for any of it.

You don't have to carry the rest alone. I've already written myself into your schedule for the long haul.
en.editorNote: For sincere confessions or commitments after a while together
variations: I couldn't be there for your past, but I'll never miss your future.
From here on, every page you turn — I'm in it.

items.sourceNote: 「以前覺得人人平等，現在只想對你偏心」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
以前我一直覺得，做人要公平，對誰都差不多就好。

認識你之後我發現，公平這件事在你身上完全行不通。我會記得你不愛吃香菜、會把最後一塊蛋糕留給你、會在排隊的時候自動把好位置讓給你站。

不是我變了，是這個世界上突然多了一個我想偏心的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在日常小事中表達偏愛，傳訊息或當面說都很可愛
variations: 對全世界我都講道理，只有對你我想耍賴。
我這個人其實滿公平的，唯一的例外就是你。

en.content:
I used to believe in being fair — treating everyone roughly the same, not playing favorites.

Then I met you, and that whole theory fell apart. I remember which toppings you hate, I save you the last slice without thinking, I let you have the good spot in line every single time.

It's not that I've changed. It's just that the world suddenly has one person in it that I want to be unfair about.
en.editorNote: Sweet for everyday moments — shows quiet favoritism
variations: I'm fair with everyone in the world. You're my one exception.
I play by the rules. You're the loophole.

items.sourceNote: 「誰說生活很苦，有你超甜」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
有人問我最近怎麼樣，我認真想了一下。

上班還是很煩，房租還是很貴，新聞也沒有什麼好消息。但晚上回到家，你會抬頭跟我說一聲「你回來了」，然後遞給我一杯溫的水。

講真的，日子是有點苦啦，可是只要有你那一杯水，我就覺得這碗湯整體是甜的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在對方覺得你最近壓力大時傳，輕鬆又溫暖
variations: 生活很苦，但你比糖還甜。
白天再難，回家有你那一句話就值得了。

en.content:
Someone asked me how I've been lately, and I actually stopped to think about it.

Work's still annoying, rent's still ridiculous, and the news hasn't given anyone good news in a while. But every night when I get home, you look up and say "you're back," and hand me a warm glass of water.

Honestly, life is a little bitter — but with that one glass from you, the whole thing somehow tastes sweet.
en.editorNote: Send when your partner thinks you're stressed — warm and light
variations: Life's bitter. You're sweeter than sugar.
Whatever the day was, your hello at the door makes it worth it.

items.sourceNote: 「You're my favorite notification」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我手機一天會響幾百次，工作群組、廣告、各種推播，老實說我大部分時間都想把它關靜音。

但只要螢幕上跳出來的是你的名字，我就會立刻拿起來看，連走路都會慢下來。

別人傳訊息是打擾，只有你傳訊息，是我那天唯一願意接的提醒。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合遠距離或工作很忙的情侶，講出對方訊息的重量
variations: 全世界的通知我都想關，只有你的我想開大聲。
你的名字一跳出來，我整個人就放慢了。

en.content:
My phone buzzes hundreds of times a day — work chats, ads, random pings. Most of the time I want to put it on silent and never look at it again.

But the second your name pops up on the screen, I stop what I'm doing. I even slow down when I'm walking, just to read it properly.

Everyone else's messages feel like interruptions. Yours are the only ones I actually want to be reminded of.
en.editorNote: Great for long-distance or busy couples — shows how much their texts matter
variations: I'd mute every notification in the world. Yours I'd turn up louder.
Your name on my screen is the only buzz I actually want.

items.sourceNote: 「I love you for who I am when I'm with you」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我喜歡你，不只是因為你是怎樣的人，更是因為在你身邊，我會變成自己也喜歡的那個樣子。

我以前比較沒耐性，遇到事情很容易先生氣。可是跟你相處之後，我會願意多想一下、多聽你講完、多笑一點。

你沒有改造我，你只是讓那個比較好的我，比較願意出來見人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往的對象，講出對方帶來的正向改變
variations: 你沒有改變我，你只是讓我願意做更好的自己。
在你旁邊的我，是我最喜歡的那個版本。

en.content:
I don't just love who you are. I love who I get to be when I'm next to you.

I used to be quicker to snap, slower to listen, stingier with my patience. Around you, I find myself willing to think twice, hear you out, laugh more easily.

You didn't reshape me. You just made the better version of me a little less shy about showing up.
en.editorNote: For stable relationships — names the growth your partner has sparked
variations: You didn't change me. You made me want to be the better version.
The me that stands next to you is my favorite me.

items.sourceNote: 「You're my safe place in a chaotic world」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
外面的世界一直在吵，新聞在吵、工作在吵、自己腦袋裡的聲音有時候也很吵。

我沒辦法把那些聲音通通關掉，可是我發現，只要回到你旁邊、坐下來、靠著你，那些音量就會自動變小一格。

你不是讓世界變安靜的人，你是讓我終於可以安靜下來的那個地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在對方壓力大、世界很亂的時候講，給安全感
variations: 外面再亂，回到你身邊我就能呼吸。
你是我這輩子最安靜的那個角落。

en.content:
The world outside is loud. The news is loud, work is loud, and honestly, the voice inside my own head is loud too.

I can't mute any of it. But I've noticed that the moment I sit back down next to you and just lean in, the volume on all of it drops one notch.

You're not the person who makes the world quieter. You're the place where I finally get to be quiet.
en.editorNote: For when your partner is stressed and the world feels chaotic — pure reassurance
variations: However loud it gets out there, I can breathe again next to you.
You are the quietest corner of my entire life.

items.sourceNote: 「ordinary moments into something I want to remember」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前覺得，要去做很特別的事情，才會留下回憶。

可是跟你在一起之後，我才發現不是這樣。一起去買菜、一起看一部很普通的劇、一起在便利商店等微波食物熱起來——這些其實都被我偷偷收起來了。

你不需要帶我去哪裡，只要是跟你一起的，再普通的日子我都想記得。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在意紀念日、卻常被「沒做什麼特別的事」打擊的對象
variations: 跟你一起的普通日子，對我來說都是大日子。
你不用為我做什麼，只要在我旁邊就已經很值得記住。

en.content:
I used to think you had to do something special to make a memory.

Then I started dating you, and I realized that's not how it works. Grocery runs together, watching a totally average show, standing in the convenience store waiting for our food to heat up — I've been quietly saving all of it.

You don't have to take me anywhere. If you're in it with me, even an ordinary day is worth remembering.
en.editorNote: For partners who feel guilty about not planning grand gestures
variations: Ordinary days with you are my big days.
You don't have to do anything for me. Just being next to me is already worth keeping.

items.sourceNote: 「I choose you every single day」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
其實愛情不是一次就講完的事。

不是那天我說喜歡你，就一勞永逸。是後來每一個普通的早上，鬧鐘響、有點不想起床的時候，我還是會想到你——然後決定，今天也要繼續選你。

我沒有要說什麼很偉大的承諾，我只是想讓你知道，我每天都還在選你，沒有偷懶過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往一段時間之後，給對方安全感的告白
variations: 每天醒來，我都還是選你，這件事我做得很認真。
喜歡你不是一次的事，是我每天都重新決定一次。

en.content:
Loving you isn't something you say once and check off the list.

It's not that one day I told you I liked you and it was settled forever. It's every plain morning after — the alarm goes off, I don't really want to get up, and then I think of you, and I quietly decide: yeah, I'm choosing you again today.

I'm not making some huge promise here. I just want you to know I pick you every single day, and I haven't slacked on it once.
en.editorNote: Great for long-term couples — reassurance without grand declarations
variations: Every morning I wake up and choose you again. I take that part seriously.
Loving you isn't a one-time thing. It's a decision I make over, every single day.

items.sourceNote: 「you make me better」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
今天我心情其實有點差，本來想找一個人罵兩句、抱怨一下。

結果視訊一打開、看到你的臉，我發現我已經不想罵了。我也沒有變得多正向，只是想專心聽你今天過得怎樣。

你沒有特別做什麼，但你就是有辦法把我從一個爛掉的下午，輕輕拉回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在自己心情不好、卻被對方治癒之後傳
variations: 再爛的一天，看到你的臉就會自動扣分變少。
我沒辦法解釋為什麼，但你出現我就會比較好。

en.content:
I was in a bad mood today. I had a whole list of things I wanted to complain about and was looking for someone to dump it on.

Then I opened our video call and saw your face, and somehow I didn't want to vent anymore. I didn't magically turn into a positive person — I just wanted to focus on hearing about your day instead.

You didn't do anything in particular. You just have this way of gently pulling me out of a wrecked afternoon.
en.editorNote: Perfect when your partner has unknowingly turned your day around
variations: However bad my day is, seeing your face takes a few points off the damage.
I can't explain it. You show up and I'm just a little more okay.

items.sourceNote: 「with you, every heartbeat feels like home」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
以前我以為「家」是一個地方，要有沙發、有床、有自己的杯子那種。

後來我發現不是。我去外地出差，住的飯店再舒服，我還是想趕快回去。不是想念那個房子，是想念你坐在客廳那一頭、隨便講兩句的樣子。

原來家不是那個地址，是有你在的那一邊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合異地、出差、或同居一段時間後傳，讓對方知道自己是「家」
variations: 原來我想回去的不是房子，是你在的那個沙發那一邊。
有你在的地方，才是我真正想回去的地方。

en.content:
I used to think home was a place — couch, bed, your own mug in the cabinet, that kind of thing.

Then I started traveling for work. Even when the hotel was genuinely nice, I just wanted to get back. And I realized I wasn't missing the apartment. I was missing the way you sit on the far end of the couch and casually say something dumb to me.

Turns out home isn't the address. It's whichever side of the room you're on.
en.editorNote: Great for long-distance, business travel, or after moving in together
variations: It's not the apartment I want to come back to. It's your side of the couch.
Wherever you are — that's the place I actually want to go home to.

items.sourceNote: 「your morning text is the tiny sunrise」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我發現我每天早上醒來，會先做一件很沒效率的事——就是看一下你有沒有傳訊息給我。

沒有也沒關係，我會自己傳一句。有的話，我會在被窩裡偷笑一下，然後才願意起床。

你大概不知道，你那句很普通的「早安」對我來說，是一天裡最先發生的好事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在一起一段時間、有早安習慣的對象
variations: 你那一句早安，是我每天第一個願意笑的理由。
我不是被鬧鐘叫醒的，是被想看你訊息的心情叫醒的。

en.content:
I noticed I do something really inefficient every morning — I check if you texted me before I do anything else.

If you didn't, that's fine, I'll send something first. If you did, I smile under the blanket for a second before I'm willing to get up.

You probably don't know this, but that very ordinary 'good morning' from you is the first good thing that happens in my day.
en.editorNote: Good for couples with a steady morning-text habit
variations: Your good-morning text is the first reason I smile every day.
It's not the alarm that wakes me up. It's wanting to see your message.

items.sourceNote: 「comfort with you is a quiet kind of celebration」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我跟你在一起的時候，最喜歡的其實是那種「不用講話也可以」的時刻。

你滑你的手機，我看我的書，中間偶爾抬頭對到眼，笑一下又繼續做自己的事。沒有冷場，也沒有尷尬，就是很安心地待著。

我以前以為感情要一直熱鬧才算好，後來才知道，跟你能一起安靜，才是真的喜歡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定相處之後，表達「自在感」的甜蜜
variations: 跟你一起安靜，比跟別人一起熱鬧還舒服。
我們不用一直說話也不會冷場，這件事我很珍惜。

en.content:
My favorite thing about being with you is the moments where we don't have to say anything.

You scroll on your phone, I read my book, every so often we look up and catch each other's eye, smile, and go back to what we were doing. No awkwardness, no pressure to fill the air — just being there together.

I used to think a good relationship had to feel exciting all the time. Turns out being quiet next to you is the part that tells me it's real.
en.editorNote: For couples past the honeymoon phase — celebrating comfortable silence
variations: Being quiet with you beats being loud with anyone else.
We can sit in silence without it getting weird, and I don't take that for granted.

items.sourceNote: 「safe to be yourself」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
外面的世界，我都得稍微演一下。要看場合講話、要顧表情、要假裝今天很好。

可是回到你旁邊之後，我可以累就講累、煩就講煩、難看就讓你看。我不用解釋為什麼，你也不會逼我立刻好起來。

你是我這幾年來，唯一可以完全不裝的人。光是這一點，就已經是我最捨不得放掉的事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合給那個讓你「可以不堅強」的對象，深情但不肉麻
variations: 在你面前我可以不裝，這件事我這輩子真的不想放掉。
你是我可以難看給你看的那個人，沒幾個。

en.content:
Out in the world, I'm always performing a little. Watching how I talk, holding my face right, pretending I'm fine when I'm not.

Then I come back to you and I can just say I'm tired. Say I'm annoyed. Look like garbage and not explain myself. You don't push me to be okay on a schedule.

You're the only person in years I don't have to put on a face for. That alone is the thing I'd fight the hardest to keep.
en.editorNote: For the person you can fully drop the mask with — deep without being saccharine
variations: I don't have to perform around you, and I'm never letting that go.
You're one of very few people I'll let see me look bad. That's not nothing.

items.sourceNote: 「choosing to stay through hard parts」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我知道我們不是每天都很順。也有那種講話會卡住、互相覺得對方很煩的日子。

可是我發現一件事——再氣，我也不會想著要走。我頂多想去陽台站一下、冷靜五分鐘，然後我還是想回來把話講清楚。

會留下來想辦法，不是因為我多偉大，是因為我認真覺得，你值得我有點耐心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合吵架之後、或關係磨合期，認真但不沉重的修復語錄
variations: 我會生氣，但我不會想走，這兩件事不一樣。
再吵我都還是想回來把話講完，因為是你。

en.content:
I know we're not smooth every day. Some days we talk past each other and find each other genuinely annoying.

But here's what I've noticed — even when I'm pissed, I never actually want out. The most I want is to step onto the balcony for five minutes, cool off, and then come back and finish the conversation.

I stay and work it out, not because I'm some saint, but because I really do think you're worth me being patient.
en.editorNote: For after a fight or during a rough patch — sincere repair without melodrama
variations: I'll get mad. I won't leave. Those are two different things.
Even mid-fight, I still want to come back and finish talking. Because it's you.

items.sourceNote: 「loving you in ways you've never been loved」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我沒辦法保證未來會怎樣，但我可以保證一件事——我喜歡你的方式，跟以前你被喜歡過的方式都不一樣。

我不會因為你今天比較沒精神就少看你一眼，也不會因為你太忙就把你排到後面。你說過的小事我都會偷偷記著，下次見面的時候再用很自然的方式還給你。

別人怎麼對你我管不到，但我這邊的標準，會一直很高。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合對方曾經被冷淡對待過、需要被珍惜的時候講
variations: 我喜歡你的方式，會跟你以前被喜歡的方式都不一樣。
我這邊對你的標準，從來不會偷工減料。

en.content:
I can't promise you how the future will go, but I can promise one thing — the way I love you isn't going to look like any version of being loved you've had before.

I'm not going to glance at you less because you're tired today. I'm not going to push you down the list because I'm busy. The little things you mention in passing? I quietly file them away and give them back to you later, like it was nothing.

I can't control how anyone else has treated you. But on my side of this, the standard stays high.
en.editorNote: Good for partners who've been undervalued in past relationships
variations: The way I love you won't look like any version you've had before.
My side of this relationship doesn't cut corners on you.

items.sourceNote: 「something I didn't know I was missing」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
你出現之前，我沒有覺得自己缺什麼。工作有、朋友有、週末也排得滿滿的，看起來什麼都不少。

結果你出現之後，我才發現——原來我之前是把「缺一塊」當成正常的。原來下班路上有人可以隨便講兩句、原來吃飯前可以等一下對方、原來笑的時候會有人也跟著笑——這些都是後來才有的。

你不是讓我變完整，你是讓我知道，我之前少了什麼都不知道。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往後，描述對方帶來的「補位」感
variations: 你出現之前，我把「少一塊」當成正常。
你不是讓我變完整，你是讓我發現我以前少了什麼都不知道。

en.content:
Before you showed up, I didn't think anything was missing. Work was fine, friends were fine, weekends were full — it all looked complete.

Then you arrived, and I realized I'd been calling 'a little bit empty' normal for years. Having someone to ramble to on the walk home, waiting for someone before you eat, laughing and having another laugh come back at you — none of that was part of my life until you.

You didn't complete me. You showed me I'd been missing something the whole time and didn't even know it.
en.editorNote: For long-term partners — naming the gap they filled without you noticing
variations: Before you, I was calling 'a little bit empty' normal.
You didn't complete me. You showed me what I'd been missing without knowing.

items.sourceNote: 「the calm to my chaos」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我這個人腦袋一直很吵。同時在想三件事、擔心五件還沒發生的事，常常自己把自己搞得很累。

你不會叫我「不要想那麼多」，你也知道那句話沒有用。你會直接拉我去散個步、買杯飲料、講一個今天上班遇到的蠢事——然後我那邊的雜訊，就會自己慢慢小聲。

你不是把我吵的腦袋關掉的人，你是讓它願意休息一下的那個原因。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合常被焦慮、想太多困擾的人，描述對方的安撫作用
variations: 你不會叫我不要想那麼多，你會拉我去做點別的事，這比較有用。
我腦袋很吵，但你出現的時候，它會自己小聲下來。

en.content:
My head is a loud place. Three thoughts running at once, five worries about things that haven't even happened yet — I wear myself out before noon most days.

You don't tell me to 'stop overthinking,' because you know that line doesn't actually work on anyone. You just pull me out for a walk, grab us drinks, tell me about something dumb that happened at work today — and the static in my head quietly turns itself down.

You're not the person who switches off the noise in my brain. You're the reason it agrees to rest for a while.
en.editorNote: For anxious overthinkers — names exactly how their partner calms them
variations: You don't tell me to stop overthinking. You just do something with me instead, and that actually works.
My head is loud. Around you, it agrees to be quiet for a bit.

items.sourceNote: 「擅長喜歡你」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前一直覺得自己沒有什麼特別擅長的事。功課普通、工作普通、運動也只是還可以。

後來我才發現，我好像有一件事做得特別好——就是喜歡你。我可以注意到你今天眼神比較沒精神、可以記得你不愛吃香菜、可以在你還沒開口之前就知道你想喝什麼。

別的事我可能不會贏過誰，但「喜歡你」這個科目，我大概是全班第一名。
zh-tw.editorNote: 輕鬆甜蜜款，適合日常傳訊息、不會太肉麻
variations: 別的我都普通，但喜歡你這件事，我做得很厲害。
我這輩子最擅長的事，就是注意到你。

en.content:
I used to think I wasn't really exceptional at anything. School was average, work is average, I'm okay at sports — nothing to write home about.

Then I figured out there's one thing I'm actually weirdly good at: liking you. I notice when your eyes look a little tired, I remember you don't eat cilantro, I can usually guess what drink you want before you've said a word.

I might not beat anyone at most things. But the 'loving you' class? I'm pretty sure I'm at the top.
en.editorNote: Light and sweet — great for everyday texts without being over the top
variations: I'm average at most things. Liking you, though — I'm really good at that.
The thing I'm best at in this life is noticing you.

items.sourceNote: 「不需要特別理由」概念改寫

zh-tw.content:
這則訊息沒有什麼特別的事要講，沒有要約你、沒有要問你什麼、也沒有什麼大新聞。

就只是想到你而已。可能是因為剛剛經過一家你會喜歡的店，可能是聽到一首你常哼的歌，也可能是完全沒原因——大腦自己跳出你的名字。

你不用回我什麼長長的訊息，我只是想讓你知道：在一個普通的下午，有一個人在很普通的場景裡，想著你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合平日突然想傳訊息，不要等到節日才表達
variations: 沒事，就是想到你。
一個普通的下午，有一個人在普通地想你。

en.content:
This message doesn't have a point. I'm not asking about plans, I'm not checking in about anything, there's no news.

I just thought about you. Maybe because I walked past a shop you'd like, maybe because a song you hum came on, maybe for no reason at all — your name just showed up in my head.

You don't have to write back something long. I just wanted you to know: on a regular afternoon, in a regular moment, someone was thinking about you.
en.editorNote: For random weekday texts — don't save affection for holidays
variations: No reason for this — just thought about you.
Regular afternoon, regular person, thinking about you for no reason.

items.sourceNote: 「每天更愛一點」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前以為喜歡一個人會有一個最高點，到了某個地方就不會再多了。

結果跟你在一起以後我才發現，根本沒有那個天花板。今天看你認真聽我講廢話的樣子、看你被燙到還假裝沒事的樣子、看你睡前把手機放遠一點怕吵到我——每一個小細節都讓我多喜歡你一點。

所以我很怕你問我有多喜歡你，因為這個數字每天都在變，我根本來不及算。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合交往一段時間後，描述感情持續加深的狀態
variations: 我以為喜歡有上限，原來跟你在一起根本沒有。
你別問我有多喜歡你，這數字我每天都算不完。

en.content:
I used to think there was a ceiling on how much you could like someone. You'd hit it eventually, and that would be that.

Then I started dating you and figured out the ceiling doesn't exist. Watching you actually listen when I ramble, watching you pretend a hot pan didn't burn you, watching you put your phone face-down at night so the screen doesn't wake me up — every small thing adds another small amount.

That's why I get nervous when you ask how much I love you. The number keeps moving. I can't keep up with the math.
en.editorNote: For established relationships — naming how affection keeps growing
variations: I thought there was a ceiling on liking someone. With you, there isn't one.
Don't ask me how much I love you. The number won't sit still.

items.sourceNote: 「平凡日子變特別」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
認識你之前，星期二就是星期二，下雨天就是下雨天，便利商店的關東煮就只是關東煮。

認識你之後，星期二變成「等等可以跟你視訊」，下雨天變成「不知道你有沒有帶傘」，連關東煮我都會多買兩串，因為我記得你愛吃白蘿蔔。

你沒有把我的人生變得多戲劇化，你只是把每一個普通的東西，都偷偷加了一點意義進去。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合描述對方如何讓平凡日子變得有溫度
variations: 認識你之後，連下雨天都變得有事情可以想。
你沒讓我的人生變特別，你只是讓普通的事都有了一點意義。

en.content:
Before I knew you, Tuesday was just Tuesday. Rain was just rain. The hot food counter at the convenience store was just food.

After I met you, Tuesday became 'maybe we'll video call tonight,' rain became 'I hope you remembered your umbrella,' and I started grabbing an extra skewer at that counter because I remembered you like the daikon.

You didn't make my life dramatic or cinematic. You just quietly added a little meaning to every ordinary thing in it.
en.editorNote: For naming how a partner makes ordinary life feel different
variations: Tuesday used to be Tuesday. Now Tuesday has you in it.
You didn't make my life dramatic. You just put a little meaning into all the ordinary parts.

items.sourceNote: 「最好的事就是你」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我有想過要送你什麼很厲害的東西。想了很久，從很貴的、很實用的、很特別的——一個一個都被我自己刪掉了。

因為我發現我能想到最好的東西，其實都比不上「你願意每天回家看到我」這件事本身。我能給你最好的，就是我自己這個人——而你居然還願意收下。

所以這件事我一直記在心裡：我這輩子最幸運的事，不是得到什麼好東西，是被你選中。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合紀念日或重要時刻，深情但不浮誇
variations: 我想送你最好的，後來發現你願意選我就已經是最好的了。
我這輩子最幸運的事，是被你選中。

en.content:
I tried to think of something really good to give you. I went through a lot of options — expensive things, useful things, unusual things — and I crossed them all off one by one.

Because I figured out that the best thing I could come up with still doesn't beat the fact that you're willing to come home to me every day. The best thing I have to offer is just me, and somehow you're okay with that.

So here's what I keep coming back to: the luckiest thing that's ever happened to me isn't getting something good. It's getting picked by you.
en.editorNote: For anniversaries or meaningful moments — deep without being over the top
variations: I wanted to give you something great. Then I realized you picking me is already the great thing.
The luckiest thing that ever happened to me was being chosen by you.

items.sourceNote: 「安靜的愛」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前覺得「安心」是一個很模糊的詞，講不太出來那是什麼感覺。

直到跟你在一起以後，我才發現安心其實有具體的樣子——是我講話講到一半忘記要說什麼，你會等我；是我心情不好不想講，你也不會逼我；是我半夜醒過來，看到旁邊有你，然後就可以再睡回去。

你沒有讓我變成更厲害的人，你只是讓我變回那個可以好好呼吸的我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往一段時間後的另一半，描述對方帶來的安全感
variations: 跟你在一起以後，我才知道「安心」長什麼樣子。
你沒讓我變更厲害，你只是讓我可以好好呼吸。

en.content:
I used to think 'feeling safe' was a vague phrase. I couldn't really describe what it meant.

Then I started being with you, and I figured out it actually has a shape. It's me losing my train of thought mid-sentence and you just waiting. It's me being in a bad mood and not wanting to talk, and you not pushing. It's me waking up at 3 a.m., seeing you next to me, and being able to fall right back asleep.

You didn't turn me into some impressive person. You just let me go back to being someone who can breathe properly.
en.editorNote: For an established partner — naming the specific shape of feeling safe with them
variations: I didn't know what 'safe' actually meant until I was with you.
You didn't make me more impressive. You just made it easier to breathe.

items.sourceNote: 「最喜歡的通知」概念改寫

zh-tw.content:
手機螢幕亮起來的時候，我其實已經知道是不是你。

你的訊息有一種辨識度——不是因為內容很特別，就只是「等等下班要不要吃那個牛肉麵」、「我今天看到一隻很胖的貓」、「你早餐記得吃」之類的話。但奇怪的是，這些超普通的句子，永遠是我一整天裡最想點開的那一格。

別人的通知是訊息，你的通知是「有人在想我」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 描述對方訊息在日常裡的特殊位置，輕巧不浮誇
variations: 我手機那麼多通知，只有你那一格我每次都想立刻點開。
別人傳訊息是聯絡，你傳訊息是「有人在想我」。

en.content:
My phone lights up and I usually already know it's you before I look.

Your texts have a recognizable shape. Not because they're special — it's stuff like 'wanna grab that beef noodle place after work,' 'I saw a really fat cat today,' 'don't skip breakfast.' But for some reason these completely ordinary lines are the one notification I actually want to open all day.

Other people send messages. You send proof that someone's thinking about me.
en.editorNote: Describes the small daily weight of a partner's texts without being over the top
variations: Out of every notification on my phone, yours is the one I always open first.
Other people text me. You remind me someone's thinking about me.

items.sourceNote: 「不會說話也想被聽到」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我知道我講話常常很怪。該講的時候不講，不該講的時候講太多，講到一半又自己亂跑題。

但你有沒有發現——只有在你面前，我才會這樣。不是我不會講話，是因為你是少數幾個我不用先想好「這樣講會不會被討厭」的人。

所以我講得很爛的時候，請你不要覺得我沒在用心。我是太用心了，才會這麼笨。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合不太會表達感情、講話笨拙的人，把「笨」轉成真心
variations: 我在你面前才會講得這麼亂，因為你是少數我不用裝的人。
我講得爛不是不用心，是太用心了才這麼笨。

en.content:
I know I talk weird sometimes. I don't say things when I should, I overshare when I shouldn't, and I lose the thread of my own sentences halfway through.

But have you noticed I only do this around you? It's not that I can't talk. It's that you're one of the very few people I don't have to pre-edit myself for.

So when I fumble something, please don't think I don't care. It's the opposite — I care so much that I get clumsy.
en.editorNote: For someone who isn't smooth with words — reframes awkwardness as sincerity
variations: I only get this scrambled around you. You're one of the few people I don't have to edit for.
When I fumble my words, it's not that I don't care. I care too much to be smooth.

items.sourceNote: 「平凡日子裡的選擇」主題改寫

zh-tw.content:
我不會每天都跟你說「我愛你」，因為我覺得那會變得太像口頭禪。

但你可以注意一下——你睡前手機沒充電，我會幫你插上；你忘記吃藥，我會擺在你看得到的地方；你出門前我會偷看一下你的外套夠不夠厚。我沒有講那三個字，但這些動作其實都在講。

我愛你的方式比較笨，是把它拆成一百個小事，一天偷偷塞給你幾個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合不擅長口頭表達、用行動愛人的類型
variations: 我沒每天說我愛你，是因為我把它拆成一百件小事偷偷做了。
我愛你的方式比較笨——不是用嘴，是用動作。

en.content:
I don't say 'I love you' every day, because I'm worried it'll start sounding like a reflex.

But if you pay attention — your phone's at 4% before bed, I plug it in. You forget your meds, I leave them where you can't miss them. Before you walk out the door, I check whether your jacket is warm enough. I'm not saying those three words, but everything I'm doing kind of is.

My version of loving you is dumber. I broke it into a hundred small things and slip a few into your day without telling you.
en.editorNote: For the action-over-words type — naming a quieter love language
variations: I don't say it every day. I broke it into a hundred small things instead.
My way of loving you is clumsier — it's not words, it's everything I do when you're not looking.

items.sourceNote: 「未來感」具體化改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前不太敢想未來，因為未來太大了，想著想著就會慌。

可是跟你聊天的時候，我發現未來變得很具體——是「下個月去那家新開的烤肉店」、是「明年生日我們去花蓮」、是「等我們有家裡的時候要養一隻什麼狗」。我不再害怕未來了，是因為每一個未來的格子裡，你都有自己的位置。

你沒有給我什麼很厲害的承諾，你只是讓我覺得：之後的日子，有你就還可以。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往中、開始談未來的階段，深情但不沉重
variations: 以前未來太大讓我害怕，跟你在一起以後，未來變成一格一格都有你。
你沒給我很厲害的承諾，你只是讓我相信之後的日子有你就還可以。

en.content:
I used to avoid thinking about the future. It was too big — every time I tried, I'd just spiral.

Then I started talking to you, and the future got specific. It became 'that new barbecue place next month,' 'Hualien for your birthday next year,' 'what kind of dog we'd get if we lived together someday.' I'm not scared of the future anymore. Every square of it has you sitting in it.

You never made me some huge dramatic promise. You just made me feel like — whatever's coming, it'll be okay as long as you're in it.
en.editorNote: For couples beginning to talk about a shared future — earnest but not heavy
variations: The future used to scare me because it was too big. Now every part of it has you in it.
You didn't make me a huge promise. You just made the future feel okay.

items.sourceNote: 「世界從來不完美，直到你出現」概念延伸，加入日常細節

zh-tw.content:
我以前覺得這個世界就這樣了——捷運會誤點、咖啡會灑出來、星期一永遠太早來。

後來你出現了，這些事情還是會發生，但我發現我不再那麼在意了。捷運誤點剛好可以多回你一則訊息、咖啡灑出來你會笑著遞衛生紙給我、星期一變成「離週末看到你又近了五天」。

世界沒有變得完美，是你讓我有了一個願意忍受不完美的理由。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合交往一段時間、想表達「你是我撐住生活的理由」的時刻
variations: 世界沒變好，是你讓我願意繼續面對它。
你沒有讓我的生活變完美，你只是讓我有理由去笑那些不完美。

en.content:
I used to think the world was just like this — trains run late, coffee spills, Mondays come too soon.

Then you showed up. All those things still happen, but somehow I stopped minding. A late train means a few extra minutes to text you back. Spilled coffee means you laughing while handing me napkins. Monday just means I'm five days closer to seeing you again.

The world didn't get more perfect. You just gave me a reason to put up with it.
en.editorNote: For couples a few months in — naming the quiet way they hold your life together
variations: The world didn't get better. You just made me willing to face it.
You didn't fix my life. You just made me okay with the parts that are still broken.

items.sourceNote: 「在一起」概念改寫成更口語、更台味的版本

zh-tw.content:
我發現我喜歡你的方式有點奇怪。

我不會一直想著你，我會想：「啊這個如果跟她吃一定會喜歡」、「這部她一定哭爆」、「這首歌副歌好像在講她」。我不是把你放在心裡，我是把整個世界都拿來對照你——所有好的東西，我都想第一個傳給你看。

所以拜託不要消失喔，不然我會不知道這些東西該存在誰的對話框裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往、想用一句話表達「你是我生活預設值」的時刻
variations: 我不是想你，我是把全世界都拿來對照你。
好東西出現的時候，我第一個想到的人是你，這應該就是喜歡了吧。

en.content:
I figured out my version of liking you is kind of weird.

I don't sit around thinking about you. I think: 'she'd love this place,' 'she'd ugly-cry at this movie,' 'this chorus is basically about her.' I'm not keeping you in my heart — I'm running the whole world past you. Anything good I find, you're the first person I want to send it to.

So please don't disappear on me. I won't know whose chat to save all this stuff in.
en.editorNote: For the 'you've become my default person' moment — playful but sincere
variations: I don't think about you. I just measure everything good against you.
Whenever something cool happens, you're the first person I want to tell. That's probably love.

items.sourceNote: 「coffee 比喻」改寫成台式早餐店場景，更貼近在地語感

zh-tw.content:
我朋友問我：「你那個對象到底是哪一型的？」

我想了一下說：「她是早餐店奶茶型的。」朋友一臉問號，我說：「就那種，你以為自己已經喝過很多次了，每次喝還是會覺得『欸這間怎麼這麼好喝』。便宜、日常、沒什麼厲害的包裝，可是少了一天就會渾身不對勁。」

朋友翻白眼說我很噁，但我覺得我形容得超精準。
zh-tw.editorNote: 土味但不低俗，適合 IG 限動或私下傳給對方逗笑
variations: 你是我的早餐店奶茶——日常、便宜，但少了一天就會不對勁。
我朋友問你是哪一型，我說：「就那種，喝過幾百次還是會覺得好喝的那種。」

en.content:
My friend asked me, 'so what type is she?'

I thought about it and said, 'she's the corner-store coffee type.' He looked confused. I said, 'you know the one — you've had it a hundred times, and every single time you take a sip and go, wait, why is this so good? Cheap, everyday, no fancy packaging. But skip a day and your whole brain feels off.'

He rolled his eyes and called me gross. I still think I nailed it.
en.editorNote: Corny on purpose — perfect for a goofy text or caption
variations: You're my corner-store coffee — cheap, everyday, and somehow always the best part of my morning.
My friend asked what type you were. I said, 'the kind that's somehow good every single time.'

items.sourceNote: 「平淡日子裡的一抹溫暖」概念，改寫為具體生活場景版本

zh-tw.content:
你知道嗎，我最喜歡跟你在一起的時候，不是出去玩、不是吃大餐，是那種沒事做的下午。

你在沙發那頭滑手機、我在這頭發呆，中間隔著一條被你踢掉的襪子。沒有人講話，但也不會尷尬。偶爾你會突然笑出聲，把手機轉過來給我看一個迷因，我陪你笑兩秒，然後又各自回到自己的世界。

原來愛一個人到後來，不是每天都很激情，是可以一起安靜地浪費一個下午，還覺得這就是最好的時光。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合同居或長期交往中、想表達「平淡才是最深的喜歡」
variations: 我最喜歡的時光，是跟你一起安靜地浪費一個下午。
愛到後來不是每天都很激情，是無聊在一起也覺得很好。

en.content:
You know what my favorite part of being with you is? It's not the trips, it's not the fancy dinners. It's those random afternoons when neither of us has anything to do.

You're scrolling on one end of the couch, I'm zoning out on the other, there's one of your socks kicked off somewhere in the middle. Nobody's talking, but it isn't awkward either. Every so often you'll laugh out loud and turn your phone around to show me a meme. I laugh for two seconds, and then we go back into our own little worlds.

Turns out, loving someone for a long time isn't fireworks every day. It's being able to waste a whole afternoon together in total silence and still feel like that was the best part of your week.
en.editorNote: For long-term or cohabiting couples — quiet love language
variations: My favorite times with you are the ones where we don't do anything at all.
Real love isn't fireworks every day. It's being bored together and still wanting to stay.

items.sourceNote: 從「favorite notification」概念延伸，改寫成更貼近台灣口語的版本

zh-tw.content:
我手機平常都靜音，唯獨你的訊息會跳出來。

不是因為我怕錯過什麼大事，是因為你傳的，就算只是一句「在幹嘛」，我都想第一時間看到。

後來我發現，我整天打開手機的次數，有一半都是在等你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給已經習慣每天聊天的另一半，讓他知道他的訊息對你來說有特別的位置
variations: 我手機最常出現的名字是你，最常滑到的對話框也是你。
你不是我手機裡最重要的人，但你是唯一一個我會一直等的人。

en.content:
My phone is always on silent — except for you.

Not because I'm scared of missing something important. Because even if you just send me a 'what are you up to,' I want to see it the second it lands.

I realized recently that half the times I unlock my phone during the day, I'm just checking if you've said anything.
en.editorNote: Send to someone you message daily — tells them their texts hold a special place without being over the top
variations: You're the only notification I actually want to hear.
You're not the most important name in my phone — but you're the only one I'd wait all day for.

items.sourceNote: 由「favorite place is next to you」延伸出更具體的生活場景

zh-tw.content:
我去過很多地方，吃過很多東西，看過很多風景。

但說真的，最讓我放鬆的地方，是你旁邊那個位置。

不用講話、不用做什麼，光是知道你在我旁邊，我整個人就鬆下來了。

我以前不知道「家」可以是一個人，現在我懂了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往中或同居的另一半，告訴他「你就是我的安全感」
variations: 我最喜歡的位置，是你旁邊那個。
對我來說，家不是地址，是你在的那個地方。

en.content:
I've been to a lot of places, eaten a lot of things, seen a lot of views.

But honestly? The place I feel most at ease is the seat next to yours.

We don't have to talk, we don't have to do anything. Just knowing you're right there — my whole body relaxes.

I used to think 'home' was a place. Turns out it can be a person.
en.editorNote: Send to a stable partner — tells them they are your safe place without using cliched words
variations: My favorite spot in any room is the one next to you.
Home isn't an address for me anymore. It's wherever you are.

items.sourceNote: 由「土味情話」風格延伸，改寫成更符合台灣口語的撩人版本

zh-tw.content:
我跟朋友說：「我最近瘦了。」
他問：「你做了什麼？」

我說：「沒做什麼，就是每次想你，心都會跳很快。算下來大概等於一週多跑了幾公里。」

他翻了我一個白眼，叫我滾。
但我不滾——我要去傳訊息跟你說，你又害我瘦了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 搞笑土味情話風格，適合傳給已經很熟、會互相吐槽的另一半，會被罵但對方一定會笑
variations: 你是我的有氧運動，每次想到你心跳都會加速。
醫生說我心跳有點快，我才想起來——剛剛在想你。

en.content:
I told my friend, 'I think I've lost a bit of weight lately.'
He asked, 'What have you been doing?'

I said, 'Nothing really. Just every time I think about you, my heart races a little. Adds up to a few extra miles a week.'

He rolled his eyes and told me to leave.
I didn't leave — I went to text you that you've made me lose weight again.
en.editorNote: Cheesy on purpose — send to a partner who'll laugh and call you cringe but secretly love it
variations: You're my cardio. My heart rate spikes every time you cross my mind.
The doctor said my pulse was high. I just realized — I'd been thinking about you.

items.sourceNote: 由日常細節觀察的情話延伸，加入具體生活畫面

zh-tw.content:
我有發現一些小事。

你喝飲料喜歡少冰、不要太甜。
你睡覺前一定要把鬧鐘檢查三次。
你笑到一半會突然摀嘴巴，好像不想被看到。
你說「我沒事」的時候，眼睛通常不看人。

我沒有故意要記這些，是你出現得夠久了，自然就記住了。

而我有點私心想繼續記下去。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合交往一段時間、想讓對方知道你一直默默在看他的另一半，比起說「我愛你」更有具體溫度
variations: 你的習慣、你的小動作，我都記著。不是刻意，是因為是你。
我喜歡的不是你的優點，是那些只有看久了才會發現的小細節。

en.content:
I've been noticing little things.

You like your drinks with less ice, not too sweet.
You check your alarm three times before sleeping.
You cover your mouth halfway through a laugh, like you don't want anyone to see.
When you say 'I'm fine,' you usually look away when you say it.

I didn't try to memorize any of this. You've just been around long enough that it stayed.

And selfishly, I want to keep collecting more.
en.editorNote: For someone you've been with a while — proof you've been paying attention, which lands harder than 'I love you'
variations: Your habits, your little tells — I've kept all of them. Not on purpose. Just because they're yours.
It's not your best qualities I love most. It's the small things you only notice after a long time.

items.sourceNote: 由 2026 情人節情話風格延伸，改寫成更貼近台灣口語、情緒層次更細的長文

zh-tw.content:
其實我不是一開始就喜歡你。

是有一天，我在外面被罵到很煩，回家路上下大雨，我什麼都不想說。
你打來，沒問我發生什麼事，只說：「我剛煮了麵，你吃過了沒？」

我突然在便利商店門口眼眶熱熱的。

我那時候才知道，原來喜歡一個人，不一定是因為他多閃亮，而是因為他在你最狼狽的時候，沒有問你為什麼，只是把碗端出來等你。

所以從那天開始，我把你放進我以後的每一個壞天氣裡了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合交往一陣子、想正式說出心裡話的時候用，比直接說「我愛你」更有畫面感
variations: 我喜歡你，不是因為你有多好，是因為你讓我覺得不用裝得很好。
你不是我喜歡的類型，你是我願意改變類型的那個人。

en.content:
Honestly, I didn't like you right away.

There was a day I got chewed out at work, the rain wouldn't stop on the way home, and I didn't want to talk to anyone.
You called. You didn't ask what happened. You just said, 'I made noodles. Have you eaten yet?'

I stood outside a convenience store and almost lost it.

That was when I realized — liking someone isn't always about how shiny they are. Sometimes it's about the person who, when you're a complete mess, doesn't ask why. They just set out a bowl and wait.

So from that day on, I made room for you in every bad weather that came after.
en.editorNote: Good for when you've been together a while and want to say it for real — more vivid than a plain 'I love you'
variations: I don't love you because you're perfect. I love you because you let me stop pretending I am.
You weren't my type. You're the person I changed my type for.

items.sourceNote: 由「calm to my chaos」風格英文長情話延伸，改寫成具體日常版

zh-tw.content:
我以前一直覺得，喜歡是要轟轟烈烈、要有煙火、要有故事。

但跟你在一起以後我發現，喜歡其實很安靜。

是你睡著之後我把你頭髮撥開。
是你出門前我多嘴提醒你帶傘。
是你說「等我十分鐘」我會真的等三十分鐘也不生氣。
是我半夜醒來，看到你還在，然後又睡回去。

這些事都很小，小到我以前根本看不上眼。
但現在我才知道，能跟一個人一直做這種小事，才是運氣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往或同居後的另一半，用日常細節傳達「我珍惜」比甜言蜜語更有重量
variations: 跟你在一起最舒服的是，不用講話也不會尷尬。
原來真正的喜歡，是把你放進我的日常裡，然後不覺得多餘。

en.content:
I used to think love had to be loud. Fireworks, big moments, a story worth telling.

But since being with you, I've realized love is actually pretty quiet.

It's brushing your hair off your face after you've fallen asleep.
It's reminding you to take an umbrella before you head out.
It's you saying 'give me ten minutes' and me waiting thirty without minding.
It's waking up at 3am, seeing you still there, and going back to sleep.

These things are small. So small I never would've noticed them before.
But now I know — getting to do small things with the same person, for a long time, is the actual luck.
en.editorNote: For a long-term or live-in partner — small daily details land harder than big declarations
variations: The best part of being with you is the silences don't feel awkward anymore.
Real love, it turns out, is just letting someone into your routine without feeling crowded.

items.sourceNote: 由遠距離情話風格延伸，改寫成台灣口語、加入具體場景

zh-tw.content:
我今天經過我們以前常吃的那家早餐店。

阿姨還記得我，問我：「今天怎麼自己一個人？」
我笑了一下，說：「他在很遠的地方。」

阿姨幫我多加了一片肉，說：「那這片給他的份。」

我吃的時候有點想哭，但更多是覺得很幸福。因為連賣早餐的阿姨都知道你存在，知道我們是一起的。

你離我很遠，但你在我生活裡留下的痕跡，每天都在替你陪我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合遠距離戀愛中的另一半，用第三方角度（阿姨）來表達思念，比直接說「我想你」更動人
variations: 你不在的時候，連早餐店阿姨都記得你，我怎麼可能忘記。
距離只是讓我發現，原來你已經住進我每天的小日子裡了。

en.content:
I walked past our usual breakfast spot today.

The lady who runs it still remembered me. She asked, 'You're on your own today?'
I smiled and said, 'He's far away right now.'

She slipped an extra piece of meat into my order and said, 'That one's for him.'

I almost cried eating it — but mostly I just felt lucky. Even the breakfast lady knows you exist. Knows we're a we.

You're far away. But the traces you've left in my life keep showing up for me every day in your place.
en.editorNote: For long-distance partners — telling it through someone else (the breakfast lady) hits harder than 'I miss you'
variations: Even the breakfast lady remembers you when you're not here. How could I possibly forget?
Distance just showed me how much of my everyday already has you in it.

items.sourceNote: 由告白語錄風格延伸，改寫成更生活化、不矯情的告白版

zh-tw.content:
我想跟你說一件事，講之前我先講好——你聽完不用馬上回答，也不用為難。

我喜歡你。

不是那種「欸我們很合耶要不要試試看」的喜歡。
是我每天打開手機第一個想看到的人是你；是聽到你說最近很累我會擔心一整天；是路過你喜歡吃的店會自動慢下腳步。

我不是要你馬上給我答案，我也知道喜歡跟在一起是兩件事。

但我想讓你知道，這份喜歡是真的、是好好想過的、不是一時的。

你不用回我，我只是想說出來，這樣比較像我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合鼓起勇氣要告白、但又不想壓力給對方的時候用，誠實但不勉強，反而最動人
variations: 我不是要逼你做決定，我只是不想讓自己再裝沒事了。
說出來不是為了得到答案，是因為這份喜歡值得被講出來。

en.content:
I want to tell you something. Before I do — you don't have to answer right away. You don't have to make it weird.

I like you.

Not the 'hey we're compatible, wanna try this out?' kind of like.
The kind where you're the first person I want to see when I open my phone. Where you mentioning you're tired makes me worry the whole day. Where I slow down when I walk past a place you like.

I'm not asking for an answer right now. I know liking someone and being with someone are two different things.

But I wanted you to know this is real. I've thought about it. It's not a phase.

You don't have to reply. I just needed to say it out loud. That's more like me.
en.editorNote: For when you're ready to confess but don't want to pressure them — honest without demanding lands the hardest
variations: I'm not asking you to decide anything. I just couldn't keep pretending I was fine.
I'm not saying it to get an answer. I'm saying it because this feeling deserves to be said.

items.sourceNote: Theme: morning warmth / daily affection

zh-tw.content: 早安。我沒什麼大事要說，就是想讓你睜開眼睛的第一件事，是知道有人在想你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每天早上傳給另一半，不用華麗，重點是讓對方一起床就感覺被惦記
variations: 早安，今天也記得，你不是一個人在過這一天。
還沒喝咖啡前先看到這個——有人從一大早就開始喜歡你了。

en.content: Morning. Nothing big to say, I just wanted the first thing you see today to be proof that someone's thinking about you.
en.editorNote: A daily good-morning text for your partner — no fireworks needed, just letting them wake up feeling remembered
variations: Good morning. However today goes, you're not getting through it alone.
Read this before your coffee: someone's been into you since sunrise.

items.sourceNote: Theme: long distance / missing you

zh-tw.content: 我們之間隔了好幾個小時的車程，但奇怪的是，我從來沒覺得你離我很遠。想你的時候，你就在心裡，比誰都近。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合遠距離戀愛時傳，安撫對方也安撫自己，重點是把距離講成不影響感情的東西
variations: 距離只是讓見面那天變得更值得，我等得起。
地圖上我們是兩個點，可是我每天醒來想的都是同一個人。

en.content: There are a few hours of road between us, but the strange thing is, you never feel far away. When I miss you, you're right here in my chest, closer than anyone.
en.editorNote: For long-distance couples — comforts them and you, reframing the distance as something that can't reach the feeling
variations: The distance just makes the day we meet worth more. I can wait.
On a map we're two dots, but I wake up thinking about the same person every single day.

items.sourceNote: Theme: emotional safety / acceptance

zh-tw.content: 你不用在我面前裝得很好。累了就說累，難過就難過，我喜歡的不只是你開心的樣子，是全部的你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合對方撐得很辛苦、習慣報喜不報憂的時候，給的是安全感而不是大道理
variations: 在我這裡你可以不堅強，那是我的工作。
你不需要每天都很好，我也會在你不好的日子裡。

en.content: You don't have to hold it together around me. If you're tired, say you're tired. If you're sad, be sad. I didn't fall for the happy version of you — I fell for all of you.
en.editorNote: For when they're carrying too much and only ever share the good news — this offers safety, not a lecture
variations: With me you're allowed to not be strong. That part's my job.
You don't have to be okay every day. I'll be here on the days you're not.

items.sourceNote: Theme: quiet everyday love / companionship

zh-tw.content: 我想要的浪漫沒有很複雜，就是下班後跟你窩在沙發上，連話都不用講，光是你在旁邊，我就覺得這一天值得了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合交往一段時間後傳，告訴對方平淡的相處本身就是最想要的浪漫
variations: 最幸福的不是出去玩，是回到家有你在。
和你一起發呆，是我一整天最放鬆的時刻。

en.content: The romance I want isn't complicated. It's curling up on the couch with you after work, not even needing to talk — just you being next to me makes the whole day worth it.
en.editorNote: Good for an established relationship — telling them the quiet ordinary stuff is exactly the romance you wanted
variations: The best part of my day isn't going out. It's coming home to you.
Doing nothing next to you is the most relaxed I get all day.

items.sourceNote: Theme: encouragement / believing in them

zh-tw.content: 不管結果怎麼樣，你今天已經很努力了。就算全世界都不看好你，我還是站在你這邊，這件事不會變。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合對方面臨考試、面試或重要決定的時候傳，給的是無條件的支持
variations: 輸了也沒關係，回來我這裡，我永遠是你的主場。
你盡力的樣子，在我眼裡已經是贏了。

en.content: Whatever the result is, you already gave it everything today. Even if the whole world doubts you, I'm still on your side — that part doesn't change.
en.editorNote: Send when they're facing an exam, interview, or big decision — pure unconditional backing
variations: If it doesn't work out, come back to me. You'll always have a home team here.
Watching you give it your all, you already won in my eyes.

items.sourceNote: Theme: good morning text, brighten their day

zh-tw.content: 早安。我每天最期待的事，就是睜開眼想到還有你在，光是這樣就覺得今天會是好日子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合早上傳給另一半當第一則訊息，簡短不肉麻又有溫度
variations: 早安，希望你今天的好心情從這則訊息開始。
醒來第一個想到的是你，這件事我大概戒不掉了。

en.content: Good morning. The best part of my day is opening my eyes and remembering you're still mine. That alone makes today a good one.
en.editorNote: Send as the first text of the morning — short, warm, and not over the top
variations: Morning. Hope this is the start of a really good day for you.
You're my first thought when I wake up. I've stopped trying to fight it.

items.sourceNote: Theme: feeling safe and comfortable with you

zh-tw.content: 跟你在一起的時候，我不用假裝自己很好，因為你在的地方就是我最安心的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在對方讓你覺得被理解、被接住的時刻說，強調安全感
variations: 在你旁邊我可以完全放下防備，這種感覺很難得。
別人面前我會逞強，只有在你這裡我可以當個普通人。

en.content: When I'm with you I don't have to pretend I'm fine. Wherever you are has somehow become the safest place I know.
en.editorNote: Use in a moment when they made you feel understood — leans into emotional safety
variations: I can drop my guard completely around you. That's rare for me.
I act tough for everyone else. With you I get to just be a person.

items.sourceNote: Theme: gratitude, glad I found you

zh-tw.content: 我不知道當初是哪裡來的運氣才遇到你，但我每天都很慶幸，那個運氣沒有用在別的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合表達遇見對方的感激，帶點俏皮又真心
variations: 這輩子最划算的一件事，就是遇到你。
謝謝你出現在我的生活裡，把平凡的日子變得值得期待。

en.content: I have no idea what luck I used up to meet you, but I'm grateful every day it didn't get spent on anything else.
en.editorNote: For expressing how glad you are to have found them — playful but sincere
variations: Meeting you is the best deal my life has ever gotten.
Thank you for showing up in my life and making ordinary days worth looking forward to.

items.sourceNote: Theme: playful, love you more than (food)

zh-tw.content: 我喜歡你的程度，大概比我喜歡珍奶還多一點點，而且這對我來說是很嚴重的告白。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合想撒嬌或逗對方笑的時候傳，輕鬆不沉重
variations: 排行榜上你是第一名，連消夜都要往後站。
你知道我多愛吃，但我願意把最後一口分你，這就是真愛。

en.content: I like you a little more than I like bubble tea — and honestly, that's the most serious confession I'm capable of.
en.editorNote: Send when you want to be playful and make them laugh — light and easy
variations: You're number one on my list. Even late-night snacks had to move down.
You know how much I love food, but I'd give you the last bite. That's real love.

items.sourceNote: Theme: missing them, wanting them close

zh-tw.content: 今天忙到沒時間想你，結果一閒下來，想念就一次補回來，而且還加了利息。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合一整天沒聯絡後晚上傳，表達就算忙也沒忘記對方
variations: 忙歸忙，腦袋裡還是有個小角落一直留給你。
現在最想做的事，就是把你抓過來抱一下。

en.content: I was too busy to miss you all day, and then the moment I slowed down it hit me all at once — with interest.
en.editorNote: Send at night after a day with no contact — says you stayed busy but never forgot them
variations: Busy day, but there was still a little corner of my head saving a spot for you.
Right now the only thing I want to do is pull you in for a hug.

items.sourceNote: Theme: good morning, you're the first thing I think of

zh-tw.content: 早安，今天我一睜眼想到的第一件事就是你，連咖啡都得排在後面。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每天早上傳的第一則訊息，輕鬆又甜
variations: 鬧鐘還沒響，我就已經在想你了，這算不算一種早起的動力？
願你今天醒來的心情，跟我想到你的時候一樣好。

en.content: Morning. The very first thing on my mind today was you — even my coffee had to wait its turn.
en.editorNote: Perfect as the first text of the day — light and sweet
variations: My alarm hadn't even gone off and I was already thinking about you. Does that count as motivation to wake up early?
Hope you wake up feeling as good as I do whenever you cross my mind.

items.sourceNote: Theme: you make ordinary days feel special

zh-tw.content: 跟你在一起，連最普通的星期二都變得有點特別，明明什麼大事都沒發生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合平凡的約會後或一起耍廢一整天時傳
variations: 我們又沒幹嘛，但今天還是我這週最喜歡的一天。
原來幸福不用很大件，有你在旁邊就夠了。

en.content: With you, even the most ordinary Tuesday feels a little special — and nothing big even happened.
en.editorNote: Send after a low-key date or a whole day of doing nothing together
variations: We didn't really do anything, but today's still my favorite day this week.
Turns out happiness doesn't have to be a big deal. Having you next to me is plenty.

items.sourceNote: Theme: no reason, just wanted you to know you're thought of

zh-tw.content: 沒什麼事，就是突然想到你，想讓你知道你正被一個人放在心上。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合白天隨手傳，沒理由也是一種理由
variations: 這則訊息沒重點，重點是傳的人是我，想的人是你。
不用回，只是想讓你今天多被想念一次。

en.content: No reason for this — you just popped into my head, and I wanted you to know someone's holding you in their heart right now.
en.editorNote: A no-occasion daytime text; no reason is its own reason
variations: This message has no point. The point is it's from me, and I was thinking of you.
No need to reply — just wanted you to get thought about one extra time today.

items.sourceNote: Theme: seeing your name on my phone makes me happy

zh-tw.content: 每次手機亮起來看到是你的名字，我都會先偷偷笑一下才點開。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合聊天到一半突然告白，承認對方多重要
variations: 你的名字出現在通知欄，是我一天裡最沒抵抗力的瞬間。
別人傳訊息我會猶豫要不要回，只有你，我每次都秒看。

en.content: Every time my phone lights up and it's your name, I do a little secret smile before I even open it.
en.editorNote: A mid-chat confession admitting how much they matter
variations: Your name in my notifications is the moment I have zero defenses all day.
With other people I think about whether to reply. With you, I open it instantly every time.

items.sourceNote: Theme: you make me feel safe, nice having you next to me

zh-tw.content: 跟你在一起最舒服的地方，是我不用裝得很好，因為你連我不好的樣子都接得住。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在對方撐住你低潮後傳，表達深層的安全感
variations: 有你在，我才敢偶爾不堅強一下。
你不是讓我變更好，是讓我覺得本來的我就夠了。

en.content: The best part of being with you is that I don't have to pretend I'm okay — you catch me even on my worst days.
en.editorNote: Send after they've carried you through a rough patch — speaks to deep safety
variations: With you around, I finally feel safe enough to not be strong for once.
You don't make me a better person — you make me feel like who I already am is enough.
